title: How to Set Up Distributor Clusters in Ezupp
description: Step-by-step instructions for building territory clusters that support clean assignment, performance tracking, and escalation flows.
excerpt: Use this guide when launching a new zone or restructuring existing territories in the Ezupp console.
author: Ezupp Implementation Team

sections.text: Cluster design should follow outlet density, not administrative boundaries. This improves route quality and manager oversight.

items: Prepare cleaned distributor and outlet master data.
Finalize cluster naming rules and ownership levels.
Confirm the escalation matrix for each cluster.
Open Admin > Territory Setup > Cluster Manager.
Create clusters by zone and assign default sales hierarchy.
Map distributors and validate overlap warnings.
Publish and run a pilot sync for one business day.
